book.mobstoolforging.subtitle: Tools, armour, heat, and workmanship

Pour a metal part with a reusable cast

jei.mobstoolforging.material_traits.effe: Level I: suitable-block mining ×1.75; attacks bypass 30% of armour mitigation.
Level I: mining ×1.15 and attack speed +0.55; ignores air/water penalties and grants effective Quick Charge II.
Level I: suitable-block mining ×1.30 and physical damage ×1.60, but wear ×1.50.
Level I: Fortune and Looting operate 2 effective levels higher, including from level zero.
With Better Enchanting, each gold component grants +1 enchantment capacity.
Level I: suitable-block mining ×1.20 and physical damage ×1.35, but wear ×2.
Level I: suitable-block mining ×1.15 and physical damage ×1.35.
Fireproof; smelts eligible block drops automatically and ignites damaged targets for 5 seconds.
Fireproof; Level I doubles durability, multiplies physical base damage by 1.30, and raises eligible heads to diamond harvest tier.
Level I: prevents 75% of durability wear and each repair material restores 50%.
Level I: the highest-level installed non-curse enchantment operates 2 effective levels higher.
Level I: mining ×1.25, attack speed +0.35, and repairs restore 50% more.
Level I: mining ×1.60 and attack speed +0.75, but durability wear is doubled.
Crossbows gain effective Quick Charge II and deal 30% more projectile damage at Level I.
As condition falls below 75% / 50% / 25%, mining and damage gain +25% / +50% / +100%.
